reason: Deploy of 2026-06-24 ships modules 01-16 (the combine-pipeline core). Module 17 (operator UI for blocked SKUs) is deferred to a later phase; the backend already exposes the blocked state + a blocked count, so the floor can capture and sync without it.

deferred_modules.name: blocked-sku-feedback
deferred_modules.reason: Operator UI for name-poisoned/blocked SKUs. Consumes the `blocked` state already emitted by module 16. App degrades gracefully without it (frontend ignores the extra field). Next build after this deploy.
